special_mechanics.name: Sword Combat
special_mechanics.description: David can attack with sword at standstill, while moving, while jumping, and via mid-air lunging

special_mechanics.name: Elemental Magic
special_mechanics.description: Four types of elemental magic (classical elements). Can be used individually or combined. Water magic allows self-healing.

special_mechanics.name: Isometric Platforming
special_mechanics.description: Game played from isometric perspective with multi-level dungeon traversal

tier_notes: T2 (empirical/qualitative) - Movement physics parameters not documented in available sources. Wikipedia article focuses on gameplay features, plot, and development history rather than technical movement specifications. No specific velocity, acceleration, or gravity values documented.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Light Crusader article (gameplay and development sections)
